## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, renewal, and ongoing collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/GVJ-WkZrwzg9NYy2b--oF9f3pxpG2QVc?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Renewal: Moving towards annual contracts, but maintaining current quarterly setup for Webstacks](https://fathom.video/share/GVJ-WkZrwzg9NYy2b--oF9f3pxpG2QVc?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [Content Calendar: New focus on chapter-by-chapter content creation, with Jesse reviewing before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/GVJ-WkZrwzg9NYy2b--oF9f3pxpG2QVc?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [Community Insights: Jesse to share aggregated client network conversations for content ideation](https://fathom.video/share/GVJ-WkZrwzg9NYy2b--oF9f3pxpG2QVc?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [Visual Content: Webstacks designer available for quick turnaround on blog post visuals](https://fathom.video/share/GVJ-WkZrwzg9NYy2b--oF9f3pxpG2QVc?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)

## Topics

### Contract Renewal

  - [Discussing shift to annual contracts, but maintaining quarterly setup for Webstacks](https://fathom.video/share/GVJ-WkZrwzg9NYy2b--oF9f3pxpG2QVc?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [Andi to follow up with Bridget on contract details](https://fathom.video/share/GVJ-WkZrwzg9NYy2b--oF9f3pxpG2QVc?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [Current contract not ending immediately, considering renewal at year mark](https://fathom.video/share/GVJ-WkZrwzg9NYy2b--oF9f3pxpG2QVc?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Content Calendar and Strategy

  - [New content calendar approved, focusing on one chapter per week through end of September](https://fathom.video/share/GVJ-WkZrwzg9NYy2b--oF9f3pxpG2QVc?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [Jesse to review content before publishing, starting with pillars](https://fathom.video/share/GVJ-WkZrwzg9NYy2b--oF9f3pxpG2QVc?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Plan to generate traffic and promotional content around new material in next 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/GVJ-WkZrwzg9NYy2b--oF9f3pxpG2QVc?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Jakub suggested treating review as a "micro calibration" for alignment](https://fathom.video/share/GVJ-WkZrwzg9NYy2b--oF9f3pxpG2QVc?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Conversion analysis deep dive scheduled for second week of September](https://fathom.video/share/GVJ-WkZrwzg9NYy2b--oF9f3pxpG2QVc?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)

### Client Network Insights

  - [Jesse to share Google Doc with aggregated topics from client conversations](https://fathom.video/share/GVJ-WkZrwzg9NYy2b--oF9f3pxpG2QVc?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
  - [Launching Slack channel with wiki for client network](https://fathom.video/share/GVJ-WkZrwzg9NYy2b--oF9f3pxpG2QVc?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
  - [Monthly roundtable discussions starting next month, focusing on AI in web management](https://fathom.video/share/GVJ-WkZrwzg9NYy2b--oF9f3pxpG2QVc?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)
  - [Potential for using anonymized or attributed quotes in content, with permission](https://fathom.video/share/GVJ-WkZrwzg9NYy2b--oF9f3pxpG2QVc?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)

### Visual Content Integration

  - [Jesse's designer available for quick turnaround on blog post visuals (1-2 days)](https://fathom.video/share/GVJ-WkZrwzg9NYy2b--oF9f3pxpG2QVc?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
  - [Team to include image/graphic suggestions in Google Docs for review](https://fathom.video/share/GVJ-WkZrwzg9NYy2b--oF9f3pxpG2QVc?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
  - [Opportunity to create branded visuals from shared video content](https://fathom.video/share/GVJ-WkZrwzg9NYy2b--oF9f3pxpG2QVc?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)

### Technical Updates

  - [Multi-column comparison chart module not yet added due to dev team changeover](https://fathom.video/share/GVJ-WkZrwzg9NYy2b--oF9f3pxpG2QVc?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
